--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -2,91 +2,92 @@
 import torch.nn as nn

 import torch.nn.functional as F

 

+

+def sym_norm_adj(adj):

+    """Symmetric normalization: D^{-1/2} (A + I) D^{-1/2}"""

+    adj = adj + torch.eye(adj.size(0), device=adj.device)

+    degree = adj.sum(dim=1)

+    d_inv_sqrt = torch.pow(degree, -0.5)

+    d_inv_sqrt[torch.isinf(d_inv_sqrt)] = 0.0

+    D_inv_sqrt = torch.diag(d_inv_sqrt)

+    return D_inv_sqrt @ adj @ D_inv_sqrt

+

+

 class GraphConv(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, in_dim, out_dim, adj):

+    def __init__(self, in_dim, out_dim):

         super().__init__()

-        self.adj = nn.Parameter(adj, requires_grad=False)

-        self.W = nn.Parameter(torch.FloatTensor(in_dim, out_dim))

-        self.b = nn.Parameter(torch.FloatTensor(out_dim))

-        self.reset_parameters()

-    

-    def reset_parameters(self):

-        nn.init.xavier_uniform_(self.W)

-        nn.init.zeros_(self.b)

-    

-    def forward(self, x):

-        # x: [B, N, C]

-        support = torch.matmul(x, self.W)  # [B, N, out_dim]

-        output = torch.matmul(self.adj, support) + self.b  # [B, N, out_dim]

-        return output

+        self.linear = nn.Linear(in_dim, out_dim)

+

+    def forward(self, x, adj_norm):

+        # x: [B, T, N, D]

+        out = self.linear(x)

+        out = torch.einsum('ij,btjd->btid', adj_norm, out)

+        return out

+

 

 class TemporalConv(nn.Module):

     def __init__(self, in_channels, out_channels, kernel_size=3):

         super().__init__()

         self.conv = nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, (kernel_size, 1), padding=(kernel_size // 2, 0))

-    

+        self.bn = nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels)

+

     def forward(self, x):

         # x: [B, C, T, N]

-        return self.conv(x)

+        return F.gelu(self.bn(self.conv(x)))

 

-class STBlock(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, in_channels, spatial_channels, adj, kernel_size=3):

+

+class STConvBlock(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, in_channels, hidden_channels, out_channels, kernel_size=3):

         super().__init__()

-        self.temporal1 = TemporalConv(in_channels, spatial_channels, kernel_size)

-        self.graph_conv = GraphConv(spatial_channels, spatial_channels, adj)

-        self.temporal2 = TemporalConv(spatial_channels, in_channels, kernel_size)

-        self.bn1 = nn.BatchNorm2d(spatial_channels)

-        self.bn2 = nn.BatchNorm2d(spatial_channels)

-        self.bn3 = nn.BatchNorm2d(in_channels)

-    

-    def forward(self, x):

+        self.temporal1 = TemporalConv(in_channels, hidden_channels, kernel_size)

+        self.graph_conv = GraphConv(hidden_channels, hidden_channels)

+        self.temporal2 = TemporalConv(hidden_channels, out_channels, kernel_size)

+        self.residual = (

+            nn.Conv2d(in_channels, out_channels, 1)

+            if in_channels != out_channels

+            else nn.Identity()

+        )

+        self.bn = nn.BatchNorm2d(out_channels)

+

+    def forward(self, x, adj_norm):

         # x: [B, C, T, N]

-        residual = x

-        x = self.temporal1(x)

-        x = self.bn1(x)

-        x = F.relu(x)

-        

+        res = self.residual(x)

+        x = self.temporal1(x)  # [B, hidden, T, N]

         B, C, T, N = x.shape

-        x = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1).contiguous()  # [B, T, N, C]

-        x = x.view(B * T, N, C)

-        x = self.graph_conv(x)

-        x = x.view(B, T, N, -1)

-        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2).contiguous()  # [B, C, T, N]

-        x = self.bn2(x)

-        x = F.relu(x)

-        

-        x = self.temporal2(x)

-        x = self.bn3(x)

-        

-        return F.relu(x + residual)

+        x = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)  # [B, T, N, hidden]

+        x = self.graph_conv(x, adj_norm)  # [B, T, N, hidden]

+        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2)  # [B, hidden, T, N]

+        x = self.temporal2(x)  # [B, out, T, N]

+        return F.gelu(self.bn(x + res))

+

 

 class STGCN(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self, num_nodes=207, input_len=12, pred_len=12, adj=None):

+    def __init__(self, adj_mx, seq_len=12, pred_len=12, num_nodes=207, hidden_dim=128):

         super().__init__()

-        if adj is None:

-            adj = torch.eye(num_nodes)

-        self.st_block1 = STBlock(1, 32, adj)

-        self.st_block2 = STBlock(32, 32, adj)

-        

-        # Output layer: map from input_len timesteps to pred_len

-        self.output_layer = nn.Sequential(

-            nn.Conv2d(32, 64, (3, 1), padding=(1, 0)),

-            nn.BatchNorm2d(64),

-            nn.ReLU(),

-        )

-        # Final projection

-        self.fc = nn.Linear(input_len, pred_len)

-    

+        adj_norm = sym_norm_adj(adj_mx)

+        self.register_buffer('adj_norm', adj_norm)

+        self.seq_len = seq_len

+        self.pred_len = pred_len

+        self.num_nodes = num_nodes

+        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim

+

+        self.stblock1 = STConvBlock(1, hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

+        self.stblock2 = STConvBlock(hidden_dim, hidden_dim, hidden_dim)

+        self.dropout = nn.Dropout(0.1)

+        self.fc = nn.Linear(hidden_dim * seq_len, pred_len)

+

     def forward(self, x):

         # x: [B, T, N] -> [B, 1, T, N]

-        x = x.unsqueeze(1)

-        x = self.st_block1(x)

-        x = self.st_block2(x)

-        x = self.output_layer(x)  # [B, 64, T, N]

-        # Average over channel dim

+        if x.dim() == 3:

+            x = x.unsqueeze(1)

+

+        x = self.stblock1(x, self.adj_norm)  # [B, hidden, T, N]

+        x = self.stblock2(x, self.adj_norm)  # [B, hidden, T, N]

+

         B, C, T, N = x.shape

-        x = x.mean(dim=1)  # [B, T, N]

-        x = x.permute(0, 2, 1)  # [B, N, T]

+        x = x.permute(0, 3, 1, 2).contiguous()  # [B, N, C, T]

+        x = x.view(B, N, C * T)  # [B, N, C*T]

+        x = self.dropout(x)

         x = self.fc(x)  # [B, N, pred_len]

         x = x.permute(0, 2, 1)  # [B, pred_len, N]

         return x

 class TrafficDataset(Dataset):

-    def __init__(self, data, input_len=12, pred_len=12):

-        self.data = data  # [T, N]

-        self.input_len = input_len

+    def __init__(self, data, mean, std, seq_len=12, pred_len=12):

+        self.data = (data - mean) / (std + 1e-8)

+        self.seq_len = seq_len

         self.pred_len = pred_len

-        self.total_len = input_len + pred_len

-        self.num_samples = len(data) - self.total_len + 1

-    

+

     def __len__(self):

-        return self.num_samples

-    

+        return self.data.shape[0] - self.seq_len - self.pred_len + 1

+

     def __getitem__(self, idx):

-        x = self.data[idx:idx+self.input_len]  # [12, 207]

-        y = self.data[idx+self.input_len:idx+self.total_len]  # [12, 207]

-        return x, y

+        x = self.data[idx : idx + self.seq_len]

+        y = self.data[idx + self.seq_len : idx + self.seq_len + self.pred_len]

+        return torch.FloatTensor(x), torch.FloatTensor(y)

+

+

+def evaluate_mae(model, loader, mean, std, device):

+    model.eval()

+    total_mae = 0

+    total_count = 0

+    with torch.no_grad():

+        for x, y in loader:

+            x, y = x.to(device), y.to(device)

+            pred = model(x)

+            # Denormalize for MAE

+            pred_raw = pred * (std + 1e-8) + mean

+            y_raw = y * (std + 1e-8) + mean

+            total_mae += torch.abs(pred_raw - y_raw).sum().item()

+            total_count += y_raw.numel()

+    return total_mae / total_count

+
